html:
Exclusive to:

The Weevole Mantle is a craftable armor item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Fight Tab. It requires 4 Weevole Carapaces and 2 Chitin to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Weevole Mantle has 900 hit points worth of durability and absorbs 65% of damage taken.

It does not contribute to the movement speed reduction caused by the Heavy Fog during the Humid Season. However, it does not prevent equipment in the helmet slot from slowing down the player.

Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

The '''Weevole Mantle''' is a craftable [[armor]] [[item]] exclusive to the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Fight Tab]]. It requires 4 [[Weevole Carapace]]s and 2 [[Chitin]] to craft, and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. The Weevole Mantle has 900 hit points worth of [[durability]] and absorbs 65% of damage taken.

It does not contribute to the movement speed reduction caused by the [[Heavy Fog]] during the [[Humid Season]]. However, it does not prevent equipment in the helmet slot from slowing down the player.
